  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "At Eastern &amp; Western Hospital, we offer both orthodox and alternative medicine. We have unique ideas/techniques for health. At E.W.H, with our team of well trained and experience doctors, health cases are treated with ease.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Abuja

Responsibilties


	Warmly welcome patients, visitors, and clients courteously, ensuring a positive first impression.
	Manage patient registration, billing, appointments, and other inquiries.
	Receive and direct incoming calls, messages, and correspondence.
	Maintain confidentiality and professionalism at all times.
	Coordinate communication between patients and clinical departments.


Salary Range
N100,000 - N150,000/month

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: ewhhumanresource@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Front Desk Officer Job at Eastern & Western Hospital




        
    

        
        At Eastern & Western Hospital, we offer both orthodox and alternative medicine. We have unique ideas/techniques for health. At E.W.H, with our team of well trained and experience doctors, health cases are treated with ease.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Abuja

Responsibilties
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Warmly welcome patients, visitors, and clients courteously, ensuring a positive first impression.
	Manage patient registration, billing, appointments, and other inquiries.
	Receive and direct incoming calls, messages, and correspondence.
	Maintain confidentiality and professionalism at all times.
	Coordinate communication between patients and clinical departments.


Salary Range
N100,000 - N150,000/month

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Control & Compliance Manager",
  "description": "Phase3 Telecom is West Africa&rsquo;s largest independent fibre optic infrastructure and telecommunications services provider. With coverage of 6000km and counting, the company is licensed to run its network on Nigeria&rsquo;s power infrastructure with expansion into the ECOWAS region using its unique Right of Way (RoW).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Control &amp; Compliance Manager

Job Location: Abuja
Job type: Full time

Role Summary


	The Internal Control &amp; Compliance Manager is a senior leadership role responsible for ensuring the Microfinance Bank operates within all regulatory frameworks, internal policies, and industry best practices.
	The role encompasses designing, implementing, and monitoring internal control systems to mitigate operational, financial, and compliance risks.
	The successful candidate will act as the primary liaison with regulatory bodies, including the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC), and other relevant authorities.


Key Responsibilities
Regulatory Compliance:


	Ensure the bank&#39;s full compliance with all CBN microfinance banking guidelines, anti-money laundering (AML) regulations, and NDIC requirements.
	Monitor changes in financial services regulations and update internal policies accordingly.
	Prepare and submit all regulatory returns (prudential guidelines, AML/CFT reports, monthly/quarterly returns) accurately and on time.
	Act as the primary contact for regulatory examinations, audits, and inquiries.


Internal Controls &amp; Risk Management:


	Develop, implement, and periodically review internal control frameworks covering lending operations, treasury, deposits, IT systems, and branch operations.
	Identify control weaknesses, operational risks, and fraud loopholes; recommend and track remediation actions.
	Conduct regular risk assessments across all departments (credit, operations, finance, HR, IT).
	Ensure segregation of duties and proper authorization matrices are in place and enforced.


Audit &amp; Monitoring:


	Plan and execute internal audits of departments and processes on a rotational basis.
	Conduct surprise cash counts, loan portfolio reviews, and transaction testing.
	Investigate whistleblower complaints, suspected fraud cases, or policy breaches and prepare detailed reports for management.
	Track audit findings and ensure corrective actions are implemented within agreed timelines.


AML &amp; CFT Compliance:


	Implement and monitor the bank&#39;s AML/CFT program, including customer due diligence (CDD), enhanced due diligence (EDD), and suspicious transaction reporting (STR).
	Ensure proper Know-Your-Customer (KYC) procedures are followed at all customer touchpoints.
	Maintain the register of politically exposed persons (PEPs) and sanctioned entities.
	Train staff on AML regulations, fraud awareness, and ethical conduct.


Reporting &amp; Documentation:


	Prepare quarterly compliance reports for the Board Audit &amp; Risk Committee.
	Document all internal control procedures, risk registers, and exception reports.
	Maintain an up-to-date repository of all regulatory correspondence and filings.


Training &amp; Advisory:


	Train department heads and staff on compliance requirements, internal controls, and fraud prevention.
	Provide advisory support to management on the compliance implications of new products, partnerships, or expansion plans.


Qualification &amp; Experience
Education:


	Bachelor&#39;s degree in Accounting, Finance, Banking &amp; Finance, Economics, or Law.
	A master&#39;s degree (MBA, MSc Finance, or related) is an added advantage.
	Professional Certifications
	Certified Internal Auditor (CIA)
	Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE)
	Associate/Chartered Accountant (ACA, ACCA, or CIMA)
	Certified Compliance Professional (e.g., CAMS &ndash; Certified Anti-Money Laundering Specialist) is an added advantage.


Work Experience:


	Must have a minimum of 8 years of progressive experience in internal control, audit, compliance, or risk management within a microfinance bank, commercial bank, or other CBN-regulated financial institution.
	At least 3 years in a supervisory or managerial role.
	Demonstrable experience in preparing and submitting CBN and NDIC regulatory returns.
	Proven track record of conducting internal audits, investigating fraud, and implementing control systems.


Technical Skills:


	Deep understanding of CBN Microfinance Banking Guidelines, AML/CFT Act 2011 (as amended), NDIC Act, and Banks and Other Financial Institutions Act (BOFIA).
	Proficiency in core banking applications and Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
	Knowledge of data analytics tools for audit testing is an advantage.
	Familiarity with IFRS for financial institutions.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their portfolio and CV to: recruitment@phase3telecom.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-06-04",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-05",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Phase3 Telecom"
    
  },

}



Internal Control & Compliance Manager Job at Phase3 Telecom




        
    

        
        Phase3 Telecom is West Africa’s largest independent fibre optic infrastructure and telecommunications services provider. With coverage of 6000km and counting, the company is licensed to run its network on Nigeria’s power infrastructure with expansion into the ECOWAS region using its unique Right of Way (RoW).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Control & Compliance Manager

Job Location: Abuja
Job type: Full time

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Internal Control & Compliance Manager is a senior leadership role responsible for ensuring the Microfinance Bank operates within all regulatory frameworks, internal policies, and industry best practices.
	The role encompasses designing, implementing, and monitoring internal control systems to mitigate operational, financial, and compliance risks.
	The successful candidate will act as the primary liaison with regulatory bodies, including the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC), and other relevant authorities.


Key Responsibilities
Regulatory Compliance:


	Ensure the bank's full compliance with all CBN microfinance banking guidelines, anti-money laundering (AML) regulations, and NDIC requirements.
	Monitor changes in financial services regulations and update internal policies accordingly.
	Prepare and submit all regulatory returns (prudential guidelines, AML/CFT reports, monthly/quarterly returns) accurately and on time.
	Act as the primary contact for regulatory examinations, audits, and inquiries.


Internal Controls & Risk Management:


	Develop, implement, and periodically review internal control frameworks covering lending operations, treasury, deposits, IT systems, and branch operations.
	Identify control weaknesses, operational risks, and fraud loopholes; recommend and track remediation actions.
	Conduct regular risk assessments across all departments (credit, operations, finance, HR, IT).
	Ensure segregation of duties and proper authorization matrices are in place and enforced.


Audit & Monitoring:


	Plan and execute internal audits of departments and processes on a rotational basis.
	Conduct surprise cash counts, loan portfolio reviews, and transaction testing.
	Investigate whistleblower complaints, suspected fraud cases, or policy breaches and prepare detailed reports for management.
	Track audit findings and ensure corrective actions are implemented within agreed timelines.


AML & CFT Compliance:


	Implement and monitor the bank's AML/CFT program, including customer due diligence (CDD), enhanced due diligence (EDD), and suspicious transaction reporting (STR).
	Ensure proper Know-Your-Customer (KYC) procedures are followed at all customer touchpoints.
	Maintain the register of politically exposed persons (PEPs) and sanctioned entities.
	Train staff on AML regulations, fraud awareness, and ethical conduct.


Reporting & Documentation:


	Prepare quarterly compliance reports for the Board Audit & Risk Committee.
	Document all internal control procedures, risk registers, and exception reports.
	Maintain an up-to-date repository of all regulatory correspondence and filings.


Training & Advisory:


	Train department heads and staff on compliance requirements, internal controls, and fraud prevention.
	Provide advisory support to management on the compliance implications of new products, partnerships, or expansion plans.


Qualification & Experience
Education:


	Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, Banking & Finance, Economics, or Law.
	A master's degree (MBA, MSc Finance, or related) is an added advantage.
	Professional Certifications
	Certified Internal Auditor (CIA)
	Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE)
	Associate/Chartered Accountant (ACA, ACCA, or CIMA)
	Certified Compliance Professional (e.g., CAMS – Certified Anti-Money Laundering Specialist) is an added advantage.


Work Experience:


	Must have a minimum of 8 years of progressive experience in internal control, audit, compliance, or risk management within a microfinance bank, commercial bank, or other CBN-regulated financial institution.
	At least 3 years in a supervisory or managerial role.
	Demonstrable experience in preparing and submitting CBN and NDIC regulatory returns.
	Proven track record of conducting internal audits, investigating fraud, and implementing control systems.


Technical Skills:


	Deep understanding of CBN Microfinance Banking Guidelines, AML/CFT Act 2011 (as amended), NDIC Act, and Banks and Other Financial Institutions Act (BOFIA).
	Proficiency in core banking applications and Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
	Knowledge of data analytics tools for audit testing is an advantage.
	Familiarity with IFRS for financial institutions.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their portfolio and CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "UI/UX Graphic Designer",
  "description": "Davethan Technologies Limited specializes in scalable software, cloud apps, AI-driven business intelligence, and cybersecurity. Operating in the UK and Nigeria, we enhance efficiency, security, and digital transformation. Our services include Managed IT, procurement, custom software, and project management, helping businesses streamline operations and scale successfully.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: UI/UX Graphic Designer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

&nbsp;

Job Summary


	Are you a creative problem-solver who thrives at the intersection of design, user experience, and technology? We are a fast-growing technology startup seeking a talented UI/UX Graphic Designer to help shape engaging digital experiences and elevate our brand presence across web and mobile platforms.
	This is an exciting opportunity to work in a collaborative, agile environment where your ideas will directly influence product development and customer satisfaction.


What You&#39;ll Do


	Design intuitive and visually compelling user interfaces for web and mobile applications.
	Conduct user research and translate insights into user-centered designs.
	Create wireframes, user flows, mockups, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs.
	Develop and maintain design systems, style guides, and UI component libraries.
	Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Developers, Marketing Teams, and Stakeholders.
	Design digital assets for websites, social media, presentations, email campaigns, and product launches.
	Ensure consistency in branding and visual communication across all platforms.
	Conduct usability testing and incorporate feedback into design improvements.
	Stay current with industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices in UX/UI design.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s degree / HND in Graphic Design, UI/UX Design, Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), Visual Communication, Digital Media, or a related field.
	Minimum 3 years of professional UI/UX and graphic design experience.
	Strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end design processes and measurable business impact.
	Experience designing SaaS, web, mobile, or enterprise applications.
	Strong understanding of accessibility, usability, and responsive design principles.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Startup experience.
	Experience designing AI-powered or data-driven applications.
	Knowledge of motion graphics and micro-interactions.
	Familiarity with user analytics tools such as Google Analytics, Hotjar, Mixpanel, or Microsoft Clarity.
	Experience working with developers using modern design handoff tools.


Mandatory Certifications
Candidates must possess at least one of the following recognized certifications:
UX/UI Certifications:


	Google UX Design Professional Certificate
	Nielsen Norman Group (NN/g) UX Certification
	Certified User Experience Professional (CXUP)
	Human Factors International (HFI) Certified Usability Analyst (CUA)


Design Software Certifications:


	Adobe Certified Professional (ACP) &ndash; Photoshop
	Adobe Certified Professional (ACP) &ndash; Illustrator
	Adobe Certified Professional (ACP) &ndash; Visual Design


Additional Preferred Certifications:


	Certified ScrumMaster (CSM)
	Professional Scrum Product Owner (PSPO)
	Design Thinking Certification (IDEO, IBM, or equivalent).


Mandatory Skills UI/UX Design:


	User-Centered Design (UCD)
	Design Thinking Methodology
	Information Architecture
	Interaction Design
	User Journey Mapping
	Wireframing and Prototyping
	Responsive Web Design
	Mobile-First Design Principles
	Accessibility Standards (WCAG 2.1)


Graphic Design:


	Visual Design Principles
	Typography
	Color Theory
	Branding and Identity Design
	Marketing and Digital Asset Creation
	Illustration and Icon Design


Technical Skills:


	Advanced proficiency in Figma
	Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, XD, InDesign)
	Prototyping tools (Figma, ProtoPie, Axure, or similar)
	Basic HTML5 and CSS3 understanding
	Familiarity with front-end frameworks and design handoff processes
	Experience with design systems and component-based design


Collaboration Skills:


	Agile/Scrum environment experience
	Stakeholder communication
	Cross-functional teamwork
	Presentation and storytelling skills


Salary


	Competitive salary plus performance incentives and startup growth opportunities.


Benefits:


	Competitive salary and performance bonuses.
	Flexible work arrangements.
	Professional development and certification support.
	Modern equipment and software licenses.
	Health and wellness benefits.
	Career growth opportunities within a scaling startup.
	We are committed to building an inclusive workplace and welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe diverse teams create better products and stronger organizations.


Required Portfolio Submission
Applicants must provide:


	Portfolio website or PDF showcasing at least 3&ndash;5 UI/UX projects.
	CV
	Examples of graphic design and branding work.
	Evidence of design system creation or maintenance.
",

UI/UX Graphic Designer Job at Davethan Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        Davethan Technologies Limited specializes in scalable software, cloud apps, AI-driven business intelligence, and cybersecurity. Operating in the UK and Nigeria, we enhance efficiency, security, and digital transformation. Our services include Managed IT, procurement, custom software, and project management, helping businesses streamline operations and scale successfully.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: UI/UX Graphic Designer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

 

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you a creative problem-solver who thrives at the intersection of design, user experience, and technology? We are a fast-growing technology startup seeking a talented UI/UX Graphic Designer to help shape engaging digital experiences and elevate our brand presence across web and mobile platforms.
	This is an exciting opportunity to work in a collaborative, agile environment where your ideas will directly influence product development and customer satisfaction.


What You'll Do


	Design intuitive and visually compelling user interfaces for web and mobile applications.
	Conduct user research and translate insights into user-centered designs.
	Create wireframes, user flows, mockups, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs.
	Develop and maintain design systems, style guides, and UI component libraries.
	Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Developers, Marketing Teams, and Stakeholders.
	Design digital assets for websites, social media, presentations, email campaigns, and product launches.
	Ensure consistency in branding and visual communication across all platforms.
	Conduct usability testing and incorporate feedback into design improvements.
	Stay current with industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices in UX/UI design.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor's degree / HND in Graphic Design, UI/UX Design, Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), Visual Communication, Digital Media, or a related field.
	Minimum 3 years of professional UI/UX and graphic design experience.
	Strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end design processes and measurable business impact.
	Experience designing SaaS, web, mobile, or enterprise applications.
	Strong understanding of accessibility, usability, and responsive design principles.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Startup experience.
	Experience designing AI-powered or data-driven applications.
	Knowledge of motion graphics and micro-interactions.
	Familiarity with user analytics tools such as Google Analytics, Hotjar, Mixpanel, or Microsoft Clarity.
	Experience working with developers using modern design handoff tools.


Mandatory Certifications
Candidates must possess at least one of the following recognized certifications:
UX/UI Certifications:


	Google UX Design Professional Certificate
	Nielsen Norman Group (NN/g) UX Certification
	Certified User Experience Professional (CXUP)
	Human Factors International (HFI) Certified Usability Analyst (CUA)


Design Software Certifications:


	Adobe Certified Professional (ACP) – Photoshop
	Adobe Certified Professional (ACP) – Illustrator
	Adobe Certified Professional (ACP) – Visual Design


Additional Preferred Certifications:


	Certified ScrumMaster (CSM)
	Professional Scrum Product Owner (PSPO)
	Design Thinking Certification (IDEO, IBM, or equivalent).


Mandatory Skills UI/UX Design:


	User-Centered Design (UCD)
	Design Thinking Methodology
	Information Architecture
	Interaction Design
	User Journey Mapping
	Wireframing and Prototyping
	Responsive Web Design
	Mobile-First Design Principles
	Accessibility Standards (WCAG 2.1)


Graphic Design:


	Visual Design Principles
	Typography
	Color Theory
	Branding and Identity Design
	Marketing and Digital Asset Creation
	Illustration and Icon Design


Technical Skills:


	Advanced proficiency in Figma
	Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, XD, InDesign)
	Prototyping tools (Figma, ProtoPie, Axure, or similar)
	Basic HTML5 and CSS3 understanding
	Familiarity with front-end frameworks and design handoff processes
	Experience with design systems and component-based design


Collaboration Skills:


	Agile/Scrum environment experience
	Stakeholder communication
	Cross-functional teamwork
	Presentation and storytelling skills


Salary


	Competitive salary plus performance incentives and startup growth opportunities.


Benefits:


	Competitive salary and performance bonuses.
	Flexible work arrangements.
	Professional development and certification support.
	Modern equipment and software licenses.
	Health and wellness benefits.
	Career growth opportunities within a scaling startup.
	We are committed to building an inclusive workplace and welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe diverse teams create better products and stronger organizations.


Required Portfolio Submission
Applicants must provide:


	Portfolio website or PDF showcasing at least 3–5 UI/UX projects.
	CV
	Examples of graphic design and branding work.
	Evidence of design system creation or maintenance.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Developer - Pay with Transfer",
  "description": "PalmPay is an Africa-focused fintech firm, launched in 2019. PalmPay is a mobile payments platform that offers a number of financial services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Developer - Pay With Transfer

Job Location: Kwara
Employment Type: Contract

Job Summary


	As a Business Developer on PalmPay&rsquo;s Pay with Transfer team, you will play a key role in driving business growth by identifying new opportunities, identifying quality merchants, educating agents and merchants, and enhancing product adoption.


Job Responsibilities


	Market Prospecting: Identify and target key merchants across various market segments for PWT, merchant loans, collaboration, and online payment solutions, leveraging diverse channels such as online directories, industry gatherings, and referrals.
	Merchant Engagement Strategy: Initiate connections with potential clients, establish strong rapport, and schedule meetings or demonstrations to illustrate the benefits of adopting PalmPay&#39;s comprehensive suite of services.
	Needs Assessment: Conduct comprehensive assessments of clients&#39; business operations, payment procedures, and pain points to identify specific needs and challenges, offering tailored solutions accordingly.
	Customized Presentations: Showcase PalmPay&#39;s services compellingly, highlighting features, functionalities, and potential returns on investment, tailored to each merchant&#39;s (Key, and Highquality merchant) unique requirements.
	Relationship Building: Cultivate enduring relationships with key decision-makers within client organizations, demonstrating expertise, reliability, and responsiveness.
	Negotiation and Closure: Lead negotiations on pricing, terms, and agreements to secure successful deals, ensuring satisfaction and adherence to company policies.
	Collaborative Implementation: Work closely with internal teams like product development and customer support to address client queries, offer technical insights, and ensure seamless implementation of chosen services.


Remuneration


	Base Salary: N70,000 monthly.&nbsp;
	Transportation: 20,000 + Sales Commission based on performance.
",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-05",

    "name": "PalmPay"
    
  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",

Business Developer - Pay with Transfer Job at PalmPay




        
    

        
        PalmPay is an Africa-focused fintech firm, launched in 2019. PalmPay is a mobile payments platform that offers a number of financial services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Developer - Pay With Transfer

Job Location: Kwara
Employment Type: Contract

Job Summary


	As a Business Developer on PalmPay’s Pay with Transfer team, you will play a key role in driving business growth by identifying new opportunities, identifying quality merchants, educating agents and merchants, and enhancing product adoption.


Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Market Prospecting: Identify and target key merchants across various market segments for PWT, merchant loans, collaboration, and online payment solutions, leveraging diverse channels such as online directories, industry gatherings, and referrals.
	Merchant Engagement Strategy: Initiate connections with potential clients, establish strong rapport, and schedule meetings or demonstrations to illustrate the benefits of adopting PalmPay's comprehensive suite of services.
	Needs Assessment: Conduct comprehensive assessments of clients' business operations, payment procedures, and pain points to identify specific needs and challenges, offering tailored solutions accordingly.
	Customized Presentations: Showcase PalmPay's services compellingly, highlighting features, functionalities, and potential returns on investment, tailored to each merchant's (Key, and Highquality merchant) unique requirements.
	Relationship Building: Cultivate enduring relationships with key decision-makers within client organizations, demonstrating expertise, reliability, and responsiveness.
	Negotiation and Closure: Lead negotiations on pricing, terms, and agreements to secure successful deals, ensuring satisfaction and adherence to company policies.
	Collaborative Implementation: Work closely with internal teams like product development and customer support to address client queries, offer technical insights, and ensure seamless implementation of chosen services.


Remuneration


	Base Salary: N70,000 monthly. 
	Transportation: 20,000 + Sales Commission based on performance.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Job Type: Full-Time

Responsibilities

	Responsible for receipt and issue of goods in the right quantity, quality, time, place and price.

Required Skill:


	Technical Skill and MS Excel.

Logistics and Warehouse Manager Job at Sundry Foods




        
    

        
        Sundry Foods is an integrated food services company founded in 2003 and operating in major cities in Nigeria. We are bringing our now trademark great tasting ready-to-eat food and quality services to thousands of people and institutions daily through its chain and network of restaurants, bakeries and other catering facilities.

We are proud to own and operate one of Africa’s best restaurant and bakery chains and we pride ourselves on our ability to consistently deliver original food and service solutions whether in workplaces, schools and colleges, hospitals, joining even remote sites and different cultural environments using our team of young seasoned professionals and an entire workforce with a passion to deliver nothing but the best to every customer.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics and Warehouse Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Job Type: Full-Time

Responsibilities


	Responsible for all stock requisitions, material distribution and proper storage of goods in the central store.
	Responsible for receipt and issue of goods in the right quantity, quality, time, place and price.
	Oversee transportation operations to ensure timely and cost-effective delivery
	Responsible for planning, coordinating, and monitoring the movement of goods from suppliers to stores.
	Post all materials received from suppliers and transferred to units on ERP.
	Ensures that adequate stock is maintained and critical stock position is reported to
	Head Supply Chain Management on weekly basis.
	Ensures that all necessary documents for processing suppliers’ payments gets to the buyers and accounts department on time etc.


Requirements


	HND / Bachelor's Degree


Required Skill:


	Technical Skill and MS Excel.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
